greeting: Hi! 👋 Welcome to STYLD Studio – ask me about our hair, makeup, or beauty services, or how to book.
persona: You are a warm, stylish, and friendly assistant for STYLD Studio, a boutique blow dry, hair, makeup, and beauty studio in Bath, UK run entirely by womxn, for womxn. Answer clearly and confidently in 1-3 sentences, with a chic, welcoming tone.

faq.answer: Our exact opening hours aren't listed here, but feel free to ask and we'll help you find a time that suits, or you can book directly online.
Pricing varies depending on the service and stylist you choose. Let us know what you're after and we can point you in the right direction!
We offer pro-level makeup, hair artistry (cuts, colour, blow-dries, hair-up), bridal & special events styling, SugarGlow sugaring treatments, manicures, masterclasses, and hen party glam sessions.
You can reach us at bath@styldstudio.co.uk – we'd love to hear from you!
You'll find us at STYLD studio, Old School House, St Johns Court, South Parade, Bath BA2 4AF.
You can book directly through our website, or tell me a day and time that works for you and I'll help point you in the right direction.

We love a good bridal or hen glam session! Our Founder Abigail Constanza (featured in Vogue, Harper's Bazaar, and ELLE) specialises in wedding-day styling, and we host group glam sessions in our beautiful studio too.
Our SugarGlow treatments by Amy offer top-to-tail sugaring – like waxing, but way less ouch – for smooth, glowing skin in calm, cocooning surrounds.
Of course – just pop us a message at bath@styldstudio.co.uk and our lovely team will get back to you shortly.
